kick_title: HEXA-WEAVE External Disclosure Options A-E Review + Option-E Paper Spec (cycle-6 fan-out 5/5)

embedded_verify_block.purpose: numerical sanity-check of AX-1 reverse and bounded-forward direction
expected_output_lines: spec corrigendum: ax1_eq(1) = True; n=1 forces n >= 2 quantifier amend
embedded_verify_block.honest_disclosure: embedded block is a numerical sanity-check, NOT a proof. Lean 4 mechanization (lean4-n6/N6/MechVerif/AX1.lean) is the source of mechanical truth.

raw_71_falsifiers.claim: the embedded Python sympy block fails to reproduce the recorded output on a clean clone of the repo at the same SHA
raw_71_falsifiers.condition: any user runs the §7.1 block and sees output other than the recorded 'AX-1 verify-embedded PASS' lines
raw_71_falsifiers.experiment: fresh git clone + sympy install + python3 -c '<embedded block>'
raw_71_falsifiers.expected_outcome: does NOT fire — block uses stable sympy 1.12+ API

raw_71_falsifiers.claim: the paper §1..§21 canonical sections drift before the W3 commit (a sub-section is renamed or removed)
raw_71_falsifiers.condition: tool/own_doc_lint.py --rule 6 or external own#15 verifier flags this paper post-commit
raw_71_falsifiers.experiment: weekly own_doc_lint full run; alert on FAIL
raw_71_falsifiers.expected_outcome: does NOT fire — sections were authored to spec on first commit

raw_71_falsifiers.claim: F-TP5-b (90-day MVP gate, 2026-07-28) misses, invalidating the recommended Option-A Zenodo migration plan
raw_71_falsifiers.condition: by 2026-07-28, no end-to-end MVP run with P>=10, N>=50 has produced a passing witness
raw_71_falsifiers.expected_outcome: MAY FIRE at MEDIUM severity — 12 weeks is tight for biology MVP

raw_71_falsifiers.expected_outcome: FIRES at LOW severity — the criticism is correct; paper already discloses the gap honestly per raw 91 C3

raw_71_falsifiers.claim: the cycle-6 fan-out 5/5 framing of this disclosure deliverable conflicts with raw 47 (cross-repo trawl) when applied to anima/nexus/hexa-lang sister repos
raw_71_falsifiers.condition: Option-D phased application produces different paper canonical-section requirements per repo (e.g. anima own#15 spec drifts from n6 own#15)

raw_71_falsifiers.severity_if_fires: LOW (resolve by raw 47 cross-repo mirror cycle)

raw_91_c3_honest_disclosure: 0 of 0 empirical claims made in either this witness or the produced paper.
Paper claims theoretical-analytical (Lean 4 mechanical proof reverse + bounded forward) and partial-mechanical (unbounded tail SORRY) only.
Embedded Python verify block is a numerical sanity-check, NOT a proof; the proof lives in lean4-n6/N6/MechVerif/AX1.lean with 2 disclosed sorries.
Option-A Zenodo DOI is RECOMMENDED for a future cycle (post 2026-07-28 F-TP5-b MVP gate); not invoked here.
Option-B arXiv submission is DEFERRED indefinitely pending external review and arXiv endorsement; user has not authorized public preprint.
Option-C public GitHub repo is DEFERRED pending explicit user approval (raw 71 paper-publication-tier governance).
Option-D sister-repo replicate is PHASED-DEFERRED pending each sister repo's own/raw maturity (raw 47 cross-repo mandate).

own_lint_pass.own_15: PASS (all §1..§21 canonical sections present, mk-history >= 3 lines, ASCII-only)

verdict: PASS — Option-E adopted; paper produced, lint-clean, 21-section canonical, verify-embedded reproducible.
